headline: Is S&P Global Inc. (SPGI) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is SPGI a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on S&P Global Inc. on Compounding Dividends’s Substack by TJ Terwilliger. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on SPGI. S&P Global Inc.’s share was trading at $412.45 as of March 26th. SPGI’s trailing and forward P/E were 28.95 and 21.60 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]
